problem_statement: The platform needs a deterministic recursive convergence runtime in which a blocked component continuation can request exact nested or neighboring component projections, suspend without blocking independent work, resume after dependency certification, reconcile affected boundaries, invalidate stale causal consumers, and certify only the active required closure.
success_criteria: component contracts, dependency requests, continuation frames, certificates, outcomes, and audit events are immutable and deterministic
containment and dependency topologies remain separate and containment cycles are rejected
only the continuation blocked by an unresolved dependency is suspended
providers are activated recursively and consumers resume only after the requested projection reaches the declared settlement level
projection certificates bind epoch, state, rules, inputs, assumptions, evidence, and dependency-certificate lineage
changed projections invalidate stale certificates and reactivate only causally affected frames
semantic feedback cycles use declared bounded convergence while other cycle classes fail closed
root certification requires quiescence and current certificates across the active required closure
external effects remain behind closure, authority, idempotency, verification, and recovery gates
SNet parent certification waits for required promoted-child certificates
the Foundation component contract validates against a closed repository-local schema
focused runtime and contract tests cover recursion, invalidation, cycles, recovery, effects, and evidence boundaries
non_goals: no deployment or production readiness claim
no replacement of Universal Action Orchestration
no claim that arbitrary component rule systems always converge
no direct external effect from component step functions
constraints: all loops require declared convergence or exhaustion behavior
no hidden dependency read may support a certified result
no stale certificate may be consumed
rules and evidence epochs may not be silently mixed
physical-world claims require physically observed evidence
Mfidel text and symbol atomicity remain preserved by any future adapter
evidence_required: focused recursive convergence runtime test receipt
SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
pull request CI receipt before merge
separate authority evidence before any route, connector, or external-effect activation
